title: Tandoori Chicken and Stilton Crisp Wrap
description: A flavorful and crispy wrap filled with tandoori chicken, stilton cheese, and crunchy crisp vegetables.

ingredients.name: Crisp Vegetables
ingredients.amount: 1 cup shredded lettuce, 1 cup sliced cucumber, 1 cup sliced carrots

instructions: 2. In a bowl, mix together tandoori paste, salt, and pepper. Add the chicken and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
3. Grill or bake the chicken for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
4. Meanwhile, toast the naan breads in the oven for 2-3 minutes, or until lightly browned.
5. Assemble the wraps by spreading mayonnaise on each naan bread, then topping with shredded lettuce, sliced cucumber, sliced carrots, crumbled stilton cheese, and grilled chicken.
6. Drizzle with lemon juice and sprinkle with chopped cilantro.
